_comment: Per-machine overlay. Copy to config/tau.config.local.json (gitignored) or point TAU_LOCAL_CONFIG at it. Deep-merged over config/tau.config.json. Set only what differs on this machine.
_use_pi_login: Simplest portable default: no API key needed, uses whatever pi is logged into.
_or_override_a_profile: Example: point fast at a provider you actually have (needs the provider key).
